nasb.text: The wild donkeys stand on the bare heights; They pant for air like jackals, Their eyes fail For there is no vegetation.

esv.text: The wild donkeys stand on the bare heights; they pant for air like jackals; their eyes fail because there is no vegetation.

cnv.text: 野驢站在光禿的高岡上， 像野狗喘著氣； 牠們雙目發呆， 因為沒有青草。”

ccb.text: 因为没有草， 野驴站在光秃的山头上像豺狼一样喘气，双目无神。”
